selection_method: FIM-guided: middle layers (5-8) with high max_eigenvalue (concentrated attention patterns)
rationale: Selected 8 heads from layers 5-8 (middle layers with FIM trace 0.72-0.82). Heads chosen for high max_eigenvalue (>55), indicating concentrated attention patterns where inbound mass carries the most signal. Heads with high max_eigenvalue have dominant principal components, meaning their attention distributions are structured and the 'who attended to me' column-sum is most informative. Avoid early layers (0-3, FIM trace >0.85, critical for feature extraction) and very late layers (10-11, high trace under RA). Category 'moderate' indicates mid-range compressibility -- ideal for RA value extraction.
